summary: Clean TDD work with minor duplication issues. Three creation tool handlers follow the same proven pattern as existing board-feed handlers. Tests cover delegation, response format, and error handling. Implementation introduces shared helpers (types.ts) and refactors existing code to use them, which is slightly beyond test scope but low-risk.

suggestions.description: CreateEpicInput, CreateFeatureInput, and CreateFixInput duplicate the identical interfaces (CreateEpicParams, CreateFeatureParams, CreateFixParams) already exported from src/sdk/api-client.ts
suggestions.rationale: Maintaining two copies of the same interface means changes to the API contract require updates in two places. The types are structurally identical field-for-field.
suggestions.suggestion: Import and re-use CreateEpicParams, CreateFeatureParams, CreateFixParams from api-client.ts instead of redefining them. The api-client module already exports the ApiClient type, so exporting the param interfaces is a natural extension.

suggestions.description: The mockApiClient factory function is duplicated verbatim between creation-tools.test.ts and board-feed-tools.test.ts
suggestions.rationale: As more tool handler test files are added, each will need to copy-paste this factory. Any change to the ApiClient interface requires updating every copy.
suggestions.suggestion: Extract mockApiClient into a shared test utility (e.g. src/mcp/__tests__/helpers.ts or src/mcp/__tests__/mock-api-client.ts) and import it from both test files.

suggestions.description: Error tests only cover the Error instance path in toolError. The non-Error path (String(err)) is never tested by any handler test.
suggestions.rationale: toolError handles two branches: err instanceof Error uses err.message, otherwise String(err). If an API client rejects with a non-Error value (e.g. a string or object), the String() path executes but is untested.
suggestions.suggestion: Add a test case where the mock rejects with a non-Error value (e.g. vi.fn().mockRejectedValue("raw string error")) and verify the error text contains the stringified value.

suggestions.description: The implementation commit refactors board-feed.ts to use the new shared helpers, which is outside the scope of the creation tools task
suggestions.rationale: The refactoring is low-risk and the existing board-feed tests still cover it, but it is work beyond what the failing tests required. In strict TDD, refactoring existing code should be a separate commit.
suggestions.suggestion: This is already done and tests pass, so no action needed now. In future, keep refactoring of unrelated modules in separate commits to maintain clear TDD boundaries.
